results.name: nezumi
results.description: Ratfolk from Kamigawa

results.name: nightveil theft
results.description: Exile your opponent's stuff and cast it (and very similar variations on the concept).

results.name: nim
results.description: The zombies created by the Necrogen gasses of Mephidross.

results.name: nimana
results.description: The Free City of Nimana, a location on Guul Daz.

results.name: nimble
results.description: "Can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater", an opposite of [daunt](daunt) first seen on Amrou Kithkin and first named in Mystery Booster 2. See also [gives nimble](gives-nimble).

results.name: ninjutsu
results.description: Collection tag used to apply the various tags that comprise the keyword Ninjutsu. Should be 1-1 with kw:ninjutsu.

results.name: nipple
results.description: See also [topless](topless).

results.name: nishoba
results.description: Ogre-sized cat-people blending the features of snow leopards and smilodons with some wolflike features. Native to Dominaria.

results.name: nissa revane (phyrexian)
results.description: Nissa, compleated.

results.name: nissa's symbol
results.description: The map of Zendikar's leylines, also adopted as Nissa's symbol.

results.name: niv-mizzet
results.description: The Firemind, parun of the Izzet League, and living guildpact of Ravnica.

results.name: no-creature-type
results.description: Creatures without any creature types

results.name: no mercy
results.description: Cards that destroy creatures that damage you.

results.name: noncreature french vanilla
results.description: These noncreature, nonvehicle, nonspacecraft cards have only keyword abilities. (For vehicles and spacecraft, see [french vanilla](french-vanilla).)

results.name: noncreature typal
results.description: Cards that care about creature types, but not necessarily on a creature card—so they're compatible with the Kindred cards from Lorwyn, for example.

results.name: non-fantasy animal
results.description: Depictions of non-human animals that are an exact match for their existing or extinct counterparts on planet Earth. This excludes animals wearing clothes or armor, animals with inaccurate markings or colors, and animals that are speculative renditions of fossilized remains.

results.name: nonfunctional reminder counter
results.description: Effects that last forever tracked with a nonfunctional reminder counter, such that removing the counter makes no functional change to the tracked effect. See also [functional reminder counter](/tags/card/functional-reminder-counter).

results.name: non-integer
results.description: Card contains a non-integer value (any number that is not a whole number), whether it be in mana cost, rules text, P/T or elsewhere.

results.name: non magic quote
results.description: Cards with non-magic (Or non-original UB source) quotes in their flavor text.

results.name: non mana ability mana
results.description: Abilities that produce mana, but aren't mana abilities (as defined by CR 605.1)

results.name: no nose
results.description: One or more faces depicted in the image lacks a nose where one would be expected to exist.

results.name: nonstandard-bestow
results.description: Bestow creatures that, when attached to a creature, do something other than exactly providing a P/T boost equal to their P/T and their other abilities.

results.name: no one
results.description: Nobody is present in this art.
